description.short: Run + evaluate Movate agents from Teams.
description.full: Submit Movate agent runs and small eval jobs from inside Teams. Backed by the same runtime the mdk CLI uses. Drag your agent.zip or dataset.jsonl into a channel to validate it; DM /movate connect <api-key> to bind your Movate identity.

commands.title: run <agent-name> <json-input>
commands.description: Submit an agent run; reply renders as an Adaptive Card with cost, latency, and an optional Langfuse trace link.

commands.title: connect <api-key>
commands.description: Bind your Movate API key to this Teams identity (DM only). All subsequent `run` calls use your key.

commands.title: whoami
commands.description: Show your current Movate binding (tenant + last 4 chars of key).

commands.title: disconnect
commands.description: Remove your Movate binding from this bot.
